claims.claim: In the calibration run, the context-aware routed bridge achieved 1.0 exact retrieval accuracy at 1k, 10k, and 100k token lengths.
The fixed-capacity FIFO proxy dropped to 0.0 accuracy at 10k and 100k tokens in the calibration run.
A context-blind key router achieved 0.0 accuracy across the reported calibration and million-token runs.
At 1M tokens with 64 shards x 20,000 capacity, the context-routed bridge reached 0.4 accuracy across 20 trials.
At 1M tokens with 128 shards x 40,000 capacity, the context-routed bridge reached 1.0 accuracy in a single trial.

limitations: Claims are limited to public evidence JSON files in this artifact directory.
The experiment is a synthetic proxy and does not validate a trained Mamba checkpoint or production long-context model quality.
